items.summary: A side-by-side of all five Gemma-4 variants on Inferentia2 — PLE, KV-sharing, MatFormer, mixed attention, and a 128-expert MoE — the recipe that evolved to carry all of them, and the one bug that shows up in every single one.

items.title: Porting Gemma-4 12B (the encoder-free multimodal one) to AWS Inferentia2
items.summary: The 12B ships as a multimodal class with no encoder loaded, and its sliding-window attention overflows Neuron's fused-attention SBUF. Three surgical fixes and it serves Paris at ~15 tok/s on one inf2.8xlarge.

items.title: My Inferentia port matched its reference token-for-token — and still output garbage
items.summary: Porting Gemma-4 31B (dense) to AWS Inferentia2: the tensor-parallel recipe that worked at 12B collapses at 31B, NxD ModelBuilder saves it — and then a passing validation lies to your face.
